title: Draft Field Surface

allowed_fields.meaning: normalized IR event type selected by providerEventDraft
provider-observed event data that is safe to forward as a draft payload
provider-native session identifier observed from EventSessionIdentified
provider-specific raw event type before adapter translation
raw provider payload/bytes may exist before translation but is not emitted by providerEventDraft
run-scope observation time carried by agentbridge.Event; workspace draft emission does not currently persist it
reserved vocabulary for preserving unknown provider fields without granting authority
reserved vocabulary for provider-native turn identifiers when a provider exposes one

forbidden_fields.reason: central event id issue keeps append ordering deterministic
events for one task must be ordered by ingest authority
lease owns the runtime identity paired to the assignment
capability identity must match the paired lease fingerprint
actor attribution belongs to authorized orchestration
active reducer version is not adapter-local
only transition events get the active FSM schema
ingest owns external event timestamp policy
append time is decided by ingest authority

assertions: implemented allowed fields must have source evidence
reserved allowed fields must be named but not falsely claimed as emitted
forbidden authority fields must not appear in draft construction scope
EventIngestor remains the only append authority
